generalities.text: Main THE ENCYCLOPEDIA OF PURE MATERIA MEDICA By TIMOTHY F. ALLEN, A.M., M.D. Presented by Médi-T <<<<< STRONTIUM. CHEST. ► Constriction in the chest (third day), [2] . ► Pressive pain in the chest, especially on motion (second day), [3] . ► Spasmodic drawing and clawing in the chest, [5] . ► Stitches in the chest on coughing and on inspiration (after five days), [1] . ► Front and Sides. ► Painfulness of the sternum to touch (sixth day), [1] . ► Slight burning on the left side of the sternum extending upward, [3] . ► Sore pain on the forepart of the chest (third day), [1] . [210.] ► Pressure upon the sternum, [2] . ► Pressive pain beneath the sternum, at night, which disappeared in the morning on rising (after six days), [3] . ► Slight sticking in the ensiform cartilage, on walking in the open air (ninth day), [1] . ► Dull stitches deep internally beneath the ensiform cartilage, taking away the breath (ninth day), [1] . ► Lightning stitches extending from both sides of the sternum in a vertical direction through the chest, [5] . ► Drawing pain in the right pectoral muscles (fifth day), [3] . ► A sore pain externally on the second and third false ribs, as from a blow, aggravated by touch (after half an hour), [5] . HEART AND PULSE. ► Dull intermitting pressure in the præcordial region, [1] . ► Violent beating of the arteries and of the heart, [2] . NECK AND BACK. ► Neck. ► Tearing tension in the nape of the neck as if the tendons were drawn up, extremely painful and frequently recurring (ninth day), [1] . [220.] ► Burning in the right side of the neck, on motion and on touch (fourth day), [1] . ► Pain as if beaten, in the back and small of the back, in the forenoon; stooping and motion were difficult; the pain was also aggravated by touch or by taking the back out of the sun into the shade, which immediately caused a disagreeable drawing feeling; the pain extended from the small of the back over the hips; as this pain disappeared there occurred a pressive headache, now in the sinciput, now in the occiput, constantly recurring for fourteen days (after ten days), [2] . ► Fine drawing pain in the back from the pelvis, in the evening before going to bed, [4] . ► Slight drawing pain along the spine, in the afternoon, which changes to a seated dull tearing in the joints of the lower extremities, aggravated by walking, [4] . ► Sticking pain in the back, towards noon, [4] . ► Dorsal and Lumbar. ► Tensive drawing in the dorsal and lumbar muscles, while sitting (after nine hours), [5] . ► Acute pressive pain, at night, in the region of the first lumbar vertebræ (after five days), [3] . ► Drawing pain in the left lumbar region, towards evening, [4] . ► Pain in the small of the back as if beaten, together with pressure in the lower abdomen, while sitting (fifth day), [1] . ► Pain in the small of the back, especially during rest, for several days, [3] . [230.] ► Some pain in the small of the back during a hard evacuation from the bowels (third day), [3] . ► Painful gnawing in the small of the back, while walking (third day), [1] . ► Fine drawing pain in the small of the back, in the evening, which gradually changes to a burning pain in the joints of the left lower extremity, [4] . ► Drawing pain in the small of the back, towards evening, [4] . ► Drawing pains in the pelvis extending upward and into the lumbar region, towards morning, [4] . ► Tearing pain in the small of the back, in the morning, [4] . ► Slight sticking pain in the small of the back, toward evening, [4] . ► Drawing in the pelvis, towards evening, which extends to the joints of the lower extremities and becomes a sticking, [4] . EXTREMITIES. ► Trembling in all the limbs, [4] . ► A trembling sensation changing to a dull pain in all the limbs, in the morning, [1] . [240.] ► Heaviness in all the limbs, in the forenoon, [4] . ► Dull tearing pain in all the joints of the right limbs, in the evening, [4] . ► Violent tearing pains in all the joints of the left upper and lower extremities, which changed to weakness of the parts, in the morning, [4] . SUPERIOR EXTREMITIES. ► The veins of the arms and hands are injected and tense, with great prostration and ill-humor (ninth day), [1] . ► Weakness of the right arm as if all power had left it, disappearing on motion (ninth day), [1] . ► Violent tearing pains in the joints of the right upper extremities, in the evening on going to bed, becoming more violent in bed, [4] . ► Slight tearing in the joints of the left arm, in the evening while sitting, with great weariness, [4] . ► Shoulder. ► A painful paralytic sensation in the left shoulder and elbow-joint, at night (after seven days), [3] . ► Constant burning pain in the right shoulder-joint, [4] . ► Pressure in a small streak on the left shoulder, [1] . [250.] ► Extremely painful tearing in both shoulders, in the evening (seventh day), [1] . ► Tearing from the right shoulder-joint to the middle of the forearm, at night in bed (seventh day), [1] . ► Tearing pains in the joints of the right shoulder and elbow, [4] . ► Some tearing in the left shoulder and then the same in the left thigh, [1] . ► Sticking pain in the right axilla, towards evening, [4] . ► A dull stitch in the right shoulder-joint, [1] . ► Intermittent sticking pain in the right shoulder, in the afternoon, [4] . ► Elbow. ► Dull drawing in the elbow-joints, [3] . ► Tearing in the right elbow, [1] . ► Tearing from the elbow to the middle of the forearm, always when touched with the finger, even when it is brought near it, [1] . [260.] ► Tearing pain in the left elbow, wrist, and finger-joints, towards evening, [4] . ► Forearm. ► Paralytic pain in the right forearm, in the evening (sixth day), [1] . ► Intolerable pain in the middle of the right forearm like a tearing, tension and pinching; disappearing on motion (after fifteen days), [1] . ► Gnawing as if in the marrow of the right ulna, in the evening, [1] . ► Tensive tearing in the forearm as if in the marrow of the bones, [1] . ► Violent tearing in the middle of the right forearm, in the evening, [1] . ► Pulsating stitches in the inner surface of the left forearm, [1] . ► Wrist. ► Tearing in the right wrist and elbow-joints, on going to bed, aggravated in bed, [4] . ► Burning pain in the left wrist, in the evening, [1] . ► Hand. ► The hand and whole forearm became quite insensible as if paralyzed, but warm, becoming again sensitive on motion (seventh day), [1] . [270.] ► Tearing extending from the inner surface of the right hand to the middle of the forearm, in the evening, [1] . ► Fingers. ► Great trembling or rather shaking of the fingers of the right hand on pouring a liquid over them, [1] . ► Numbness of the right thumb, [1] . ► Pinching pain in the right middle finger, extending into the hand, [1] . ► A painful sensation like a burning and tension between the left thumb and index finger, even in the evening (eighth day), [1] . ► Acute drawing in different phalanges and in the bones of the wrists (first and second days), [3] . ► Tearing jerking in the finger joints, [1] . ► Tearing in the tendons of all the fingers, extending up into the forearm, on letting the arm hang down (second day), [1] . ► Intermittent tearing gnawing in the right little finger, [1] . ► Tearing and throbbing on the left side of the thumb (second day), [1] . INFERIOR EXTREMITIES. [280.] ► Paralytic pain in both lower extremities, in the evening (sixth day), [1] . ► Slight jerking in the right lower extremity, [4] . ► Jerking in the lower extremities and starting up of the whole body on falling asleep (fifth day), [3] . ► Very acute drawing in the right lower extremities during rest, disappearing during motion, in the evening (first day), [3] . ► Painful drawing and paralyzed sensation in the whole leg, when walking in the open air, which disappears in warmth and rest, [5] . ► Slight tearing pain in the lower extremities, extending from below upward, and disappearing in the lumbar region, [4] . ► Slight tearing pain, in the morning, starting from the knee-joint, extending through the pelvis, and disappearing in the lumbar region, [4] . ► Itching pain in the left lower extremity (after twenty-six days), [2] . ► Hip. ► Drawing pain in the right hip, starting from the ankle and knee-joints, in the morning, [4] . ► Tearing pain in both hip and knee-joints, in the morning, [4] . [290.] ► Violent tearing from the right hip into the knee, disappearing when walking (fourth day), [1] . ► Thigh. ► Weakness first in the right thigh, then in both thighs, still worse in the evening in bed (second day), [1] . ► Paralytic pain in the thighs, in the evening while sitting, [1] . ► Painful gnawing in the left thigh as if in the marrow of the bone, [1] . ► Frequent jerking sticking in the right thigh, as if in the bone (sixth day), [1] . ► Jerking tearing in the right thigh, in the evening while sitting (sixth day), [1] . ► Extremely painful tearing in the left thigh, as if in the bone, [1] . ► A violent stitch on the crest of the right ilium, while sitting, [1] . ► Knee. ► An indescribable pain on the inside of the right knee, [1] . ► Dull pain in the knee and ankle-joints, aggravated by walking and standing, [4] . [300.] ► Drawing pain in the right knee and ankle-joints, towards evening, [4] . ► A pulsative clawing from the knee to the toes, in the evening on lying down, which prevented falling asleep till midnight; at last itching of the toes with cessation of the pain (third day), [2] . ► Dull tearing pains in both knees and ankles, aggravated by walking, [4] . ► Tearing in the right patella, [1] . ► Violent tearing pains in the left knee and ankle-joints, after midnight, [4] . ► Burning about the knee and in the exostosis on the tibia (formerly caused by the abuse of Mercury), at 9 P.M., on lying down in bed. This was afterwards associated with headache, as if the occiput were pressed outward, and finally a clawing in the teeth of the left upper jaw; all this lasted till about 11 o'clock, when he fell asleep (second day), [2] . ► Leg. ► Great swelling of the left leg and foot, in the evening (eighth day), [2] . ► Sudden weariness of the leg, worse during rest, [1] . ► While sitting the calves suddenly become weak and weary as after a long walk, [1] . ► Griping and clawing in both legs, in the morning, followed by burning itching in the toes (after ten days), [2] . [310.] ► In the evening on going to bed, sensation of a pressive pain like a weight in the joints of the legs, [4] . ► Drawing pain in the muscles of the right leg, on lying down in the evening, and continuing through the night, [5] . ► Ankle. ► Tearing in the right outer malleolus (seventh day), [1] . ► Constant sticking pain in the ankle and knee-joints, in the evening, [4] . ► Foot and Toes. ► The (habitual) dematous swelling of the left foot almost entirely disappeared (third day), [2] . ► Violent pain in the foot, all night, with general dry heat; the next morning he began to perspire and perspired the whole forenoon, whereupon the feet immediately felt freer (sixth day), [2] . ► Numbness and crawling in the right heel with tearing in the toes, [1] . ► Extremely painful tearing in the left heel, in the evening while sitting, [1] . ► Sticking pain in the left heel, in the evening after lying down, [1] . ► Painful constrictive tearing in the sole of the right foot and in the ankle, [1] . [320.] ► Violent tearing in the middle joint of the second toe, and when this disappeared violent itching in the root of the nail, [1] . GENERALITIES. ► Emaciation ; all the clothes become too loose, [1] . ► Weak, tremulous sensation in the body (after two hours), [3] . ► Feeling of weakness, with paralysis jerking in all the limbs, in the evening, [4] . ► The whole body is weak and prostrated, especially the lower extremities, in the morning, [1] . ► Great weakness, in the morning , [4] . ► Intolerable weariness, in the evening, [4] . ► Great weakness and prostration of the whole body, even in the morning in bed, lasting nearly all day (ninth day), [1] . ► Great weakness, in the evening, with much yawning, impaired use of the extremities of the right side, slight sparks before the eyes and pressive pain in the left side of the head, [4] . ► Bruised sensation in the whole upper part of the body, [5] . [330.] ► An attack; in the evening tension over the whole head, lasting five minutes, followed by tensive pressure over the whole chest; thence the same pain extended into the small of the back, thence up between the shoulders, again into the small of the back, and thence at last into the left (diseased) foot, where it remained all night; if he lay upon the back at night, the back and small of the back were painful as if sore (after nine days), [2] . ► A single sudden jerk through the upper part of the body on falling asleep, in the afternoon and at night, which made her wide awake, [3] . ► It acts especially upon the right half of the body, [5] . [Still there are many symptoms which show the opposite. -H. and T.] ► Many of the pains of Strontium appear like phantoms, so that she can scarcely tell the place where they are, [1] . ► The pains of Strontium appear to be especially seated in the long bones and in the marrow, [1] . ► She feels better in the open air, [1] . SKIN. ► Objective. ► The skin which is tightly adherent to the scar on the forearm (as if grown to it) continues to loosen more and more (after twenty days), [2] . ► Eruptions. ► A small red pimple, without sensation, but bleeding when touched, on the nose, [1] . ► A small pimple on the upper lip painful to touch, [2] . ► A pimple in the corner of the mouth and itching on the chin, [1] . [340.] ► A red pimple filled with pus at the tip, on the left chest, [1] . ► Itching pimples as large as peas under the skin on the legs, with compressive pains in the small of the back and in the left thigh, [2] . ► Small red pimples on the ankle and back of the foot, with violent burning itching, aggravated by scratching, lasting several days (after twenty days), [2] . ► Small, red, painless blisters on the forehead, [1] . ► An ulcer on the arm is moister than usual, especially at night, is sore to touch and burns, especially towards morning; at night, the suffering arm perspired profusely (first and second days), [2] . ► Subjective. ► Itching biting on the chin, [1] . ► Biting between the shoulders, relieved by scratching, [1] . ► Itching here and there over the whole body, relieved by scratching, but not entirely removed, [1] . ► Constant itching of the nose, [1] . ► Increased itching in the tip of the nose, in the evening, [3] . [350.] ► Itching in various parts of the face, [3] . ► Itching of the right cheek, becoming worse after scratching , [1] . ► Itching on the chin and right side of the neck, not relieved by scratching, [1] . ► Itching here and there on the neck, chest, occiput, in the evening, [1] . ► Itching between the scapulæ, which, after scratching, changed to another place, [1] . ► Itching on the abdomen and left thigh, in the evening, [1] . ► Itching on the right shoulder and upper arm, becoming worse on scratching, [1] . ► Itching on the forearms, [9] . ► Itching on the crest of the right ilium, becoming worse after scratching, [1] . ► Itching on the right natis; after scratching the spot burns, [1] . [360.] ► Itching along the tibia, [3] . SLEEP. ► Sleepiness. ► Frequent yawning, [1] . ► Sleeplessness. ► Can not fall asleep for a long time, in the evening (ninth day), [1] . ► Sleep restless, full of dreams, [5] . ► Sleep restless, interrupted by frightful dreams after midnight, [3] . ► Frequent starting up in fright, in the evening while half asleep, she was even apprehensive and depressed with trembling all over and heaviness of the chest (third day), [1] . ► Towards morning, waking from the usually sound sleep, [3] . ► He woke as many as twenty times at night, with dry cough, and always on waking had vertigo, even to falling (after fourteen days), [3] . ► He woke every moment at night, but soon feel asleep again (first eight days), [2] . ► He woke about 2 A.M., and was only able to fall asleep again after an hour (after seven days), [1] . ► Dreams. [370.] ► Indifferent dreams, [3] . ► Dreams of fire, from which she awoke in fright, [1] . ► Grieving dreams, [1] . ► Dream filled with joy, so that she cried aloud in sleep, [1] . FEVER. ► Chilliness. ► Chilliness, in the forenoon (first day), [3] . ► Chilliness with shivering, in the forenoon, [4] . ► Chilliness and colic after the usual stool, [1] . ► Shaking chill, in the evening (ninth day), [1] . ► Shivering over the scalp (after half an hour), [3] . ► Shivering over the upper part of the back (after three-quarters of an hour), [3] . [380.] ► Creeping chilliness from the small of the back down over the posterior portion of the thigh, when walking in the open air, [5] . ► Sensation of icy coldness on the surface of the outer portion of the calf for the length of a finger, [1] . ► Feet icy cold, in the evening (fourth day), [1] . ► Heat. ► Dry heat, followed by perspiration at night (after twenty-six days), [2] . ► Extraordinary sensation of heat in the head and face, with redness of it, and a feeling as if the head would burst at the vertex, associated with anxiety, apprehension, and sleepiness, in the afternoon when walking, lasting till after lying down in the evening (fourth day), [1] . ► Frequent rising of burning heat into the face, [1] . ► Violent heat and burning like fire in the face with redness; beginning in the morning and gradually increasing till 3 P.M., after which it disappeared till evening (seventh day), [1] . ► Heat comes from the mouth and nose, the lips crack, the tongue is dry, with thirst (fifth day), [1] . ► Heat and burning of the feet, in the evening after lying down (fourth day), [1] . ► Increased sensation of warmth in the hands, with internal chilliness and cold extremities and feet (after five hours), [3] . ► Sweat. [390.] ► Much perspiration, all night (first day), [2] . ► He perspired profusely at night, and if he uncovered the feet he immediately had pain in them (after eight days), [2] . CONDITIONS. ► Aggravation. ► ( Morning ), Vertigo; on waking, mouth slimy; trembling in limbs; weakness of body. ► ( Forenoon ), Chilliness. ► ( Noon ), Vertigo. ► ( Evening ), Vertigo; headache; tingling in temples; dry hacking cough; tearing in forearm; weakness in right thigh; weakness; chilliness. ► ( Night ), Cough. ► ( In bed ), Tearing in wrist and elbow-joints. ► ( Blowing nose ), Pain in right flank. ► ( After eating ), Griping in abdomen. ► ( Inspiration ), Stitches in flanks. ► ( Motion ), Pain in chest. ► ( Moving eyes ), Burning in them. ► ( During rest ), Pain in small of back; drawing in lower extremity; weariness of leg. ► ( On rising from sitting ), Tearing in left groin. ► ( Scratching ), Itching of pimples. ► ( Standing ), Pain in knee and ankle-joint. ► ( Stooping ), Stitches in last right rib. ► ( Swallowing ), Pain in left side of throat; inflammation of fauces; sticking in pharynx. ► ( Touch ), Pain on second and third false ribs; tearing from elbow to forearm. ► ( Urinating ), Pain in right spermatic cord. ► ( Walking ), Pressure in stomach; dyspna; drawing along spine; gnawing in small of back; pain in knee and ankle-joints. ► Amelioration. ► ( Open air ), Feels better. ► ( Eructations ), Pressure in stomach. ► ( Motion ), Pain in forearm; drawing in lower extremity. ► ( Rubbing ), Biting in right eye. ► ( Scratching ), Biting between shoulders; itching. ► ( Walking ), Tearing in right hip and knee.
